SearchText.comment: Roster of Schemas (on Open)
Roster of Schemas (on Save)
Revit Version
Worksharing Log: indicates that the central model was busy
Worksharing Log: indicates that the operation was abandoned
Worksharing Log: shows the username that has started a session with the model
Worksharing Log: shows when a session has started (i.e. when a user starts a new session with the central model)
Worksharing Log: shows the Revit journal being used during the session
Worksharing Log: shows when a local model is being opened
Worksharing Log: shows when a Synchronize operation starts
Worksharing Log: shows when a linked model is being opened
Worksharing Log: shows when a open local model operation is completed
Worksharing Log: shows when a open link operation is completed
Worksharing Log: shows when a Synchronize operation is completed
